channel.title: Critical-Minerals on Doc B — This Timeline
channel.description: Recent content in Critical-Minerals on Doc B — This Timeline

item.title: The 10,700-Ton Hole in Glencore's Cobalt Supply
item.description: DRC export quotas forced the world's largest cobalt trader to source from Chinese exchange warehouses — and the Wuxi stockpile is draining

item.title: The Slurry Problem
item.description: China's antimony and tungsten export controls are reaching Intel's fab floor through a liquid nobody talks about

item.title: The Pentagon Has 60 Days of Rare Earths Left
item.description: PLA purges narrow China's coercive toolkit — leaving rare earth export controls as the one weapon that requires no command chain integrity
